next_suggestion: 派生 M-ANDROID-001 fix: android/index.html liveBus ws.onmessage 加 256KB size cap before JSON.parse (route-fix, 1 file)
After M-ANDROID-001 merged/rejected → cycle-complete → next full audit pick moni-master frontend post-audit-030 fix verification or sunset-prediction post-merge regression check

audit_findings.finding: liveBus WebSocket has no max message size cap — accepts arbitrarily large frames before JSON.parse, unlike relay_bridge server-side 64KB limit. Malicious/buggy server can freeze UI thread or exhaust mobile memory.
audit_findings.remediation: Check ev.data.length against 256KB threshold before JSON.parse; drop + console.warn if exceeded. Add idle timeout to liveBus.

audit_findings.finding: _process_request Response construction fallback swallows exception silently. Brittle across websockets versions.
audit_findings.remediation: Log inner exception in fallback branch. Add explicit version check or outer try/except that always returns valid rejection.

audit_findings.finding: liveBus retry counter resets on ws.onopen but not on first successful message. Connected-but-immediately-dropped cycles exhaust 9 retries (~8 min) with no recovery path.
audit_findings.remediation: Reset retry only after first successful message exchange. Or add user-visible reconnect button.

audit_findings.finding: SLOW_PATHS only covers /recommend (60s); other LLM endpoints (/chat-log POST, /wiki/build POST, /profile GET) use default 8s. Currently safe (cached reads) but contract undocumented.
audit_findings.remediation: Document timeout contract in api.js header. Update SLOW_PATHS proactively when backend adds sync LLM to new endpoint.
